title: Heath Richards contracted for MI New York
description: CRICKET NEWS - Six Gun Grill Garden Route...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers cricketer Heath Richards was recently included in the MI New York squad for the T20 Major League that will be contested in the United States of America in June and July.


> A few well-known international players are alongside him on the name list.


They include Kieron Pollard and Nicholaas Pooran (both West Indies), Trent Boult and Micheal Bracewall (both New Zealand), Rashid Khan (Afghanistan) and the South African Quinton de Kock.

Richards is a batting all-rounder, but is renowned for his destructive and hard-hitting batting skills.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
